docs.title: l10n_q
docs.text: Conjunto completo de módulos de localización desarrollados por Quanam para extender las funcionalidades estándar de Odoo con características específicas para el mercado regional, incluyendo gestión contable avanzada, pagos masivos, integración bancaria, y procesos de negocio optimizados.

docs.title: License
docs.text:
This collection contains modules with different licenses:

  • AGPL-3: account_q, account_q_withholding
  • LGPL-3: All other modules

See individual module READMEs for specific license information.

For detailed documentation of each module, please refer to the individual README files in each module's directory.

docs.title: Account Batch Payment Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides enhanced batch payment functionality for the Quanam localization, extending Odoo's standard batch payment features with advanced file generation, bank integration, and localized payment processing capabilities.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Advanced Batch Payment Processing
docs.text: Enhanced batch payment functionality that allows grouping multiple payments for efficient processing, with support for various payment types including checks, bank transfers, and electronic payments.

docs.title: Bank File Generation
docs.text: Sophisticated bank file generation system that creates payment files in various bank-specific formats, enabling seamless integration with different banking systems and automated payment processing.

docs.title: Payment File Configuration
docs.text: Flexible payment file configuration system that allows customization of file formats, field mappings, and validation rules to meet specific bank requirements and regulatory standards.

docs.title: Multi-Bank Support
docs.text: Support for multiple banking institutions with bank-specific file formats and integration protocols, enabling organizations to work with various financial institutions simultaneously.

docs.title: Enhanced Payment Validation
docs.text: Advanced payment validation and verification systems with pre-processing checks, duplicate detection, and compliance validation to ensure payment accuracy and security.

docs.title: Bank Payment File Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Bank Payment File Config
  2. Configure bank-specific file formats and parameters
  3. Set up field mappings and validation rules
  4. Test file generation with sample data

docs.title: Partner Bank Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Contacts > Banks
  2. Configure bank account information for partners
  3. Set up bank-specific routing and account details
  4. Validate bank account formats and numbers

docs.title: Journal Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Journals
  2. Configure payment journals for batch processing
  3. Set up bank integration parameters
  4. Enable batch payment functionality

docs.title: Creating Batch Payments
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Payments > Batch Payments
  2. Create new batch payment records
  3. Add multiple payments to the batch
  4. Configure batch-specific parameters and validation rules

docs.title: Generating Payment Files
docs.text:
1. Select completed batch payments
  2. Generate bank-specific payment files
  3. Review file contents and validation results
  4. Export files for bank submission

docs.title: Processing Payments
docs.text:
1. Submit payment files to banking systems
  2. Monitor payment status and confirmations
  3. Update payment records with bank responses
  4. Reconcile payments with bank statements

docs.title: Bank Reconciliation
docs.text:
1. Import bank statements with batch payment references
  2. Automatically match batch payments to bank transactions
  3. Reconcile grouped payments in a single operation
  4. Handle exceptions and discrepancies

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• account.batch.payment.file.config: Bank file configuration
  • account.batch.payment: Enhanced batch payment processing
  • account.journal: Extended journal functionality
  • account.payment: Enhanced payment processing
  • res.partner.bank: Extended bank account management

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Multi-format bank file generation
  • Advanced payment validation and verification
  • Bank-specific integration protocols
  • Automated reconciliation processes
  • Comprehensive audit trails and logging

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • account_batch_payment: Core batch payment functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute. To learn how please visit Quanam.

Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides BROU (Banco de la República Oriental del Uruguay) specific batch payment file generation, extending the base batch payment functionality with BROU-compliant file formats and integration protocols.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: BROU File Format Compliance
docs.text: Generates batch payment files in BROU's specific format requirements, ensuring compliance with bank specifications and successful file processing.

docs.title: Automated File Generation
docs.text: Automated generation of BROU-compliant payment files with proper field mapping, validation, and formatting according to bank requirements.

docs.title: Pre-configured Settings
docs.text: Pre-configured BROU-specific settings including file structure, field positions, data formats, and validation rules to minimize setup time.

docs.title: Validation and Error Checking
docs.text: Comprehensive validation system that checks file content, format compliance, and data integrity before file generation to prevent processing errors.

docs.title: BROU Configuration
docs.text: The module comes pre-configured with BROU-specific settings: - File format specifications - Field mapping and positioning - Data validation rules - Bank-specific requirements

docs.title: Bank Account Setup
docs.text:
1. Ensure your bank accounts are configured for BROU
  2. Verify account numbers and routing information
  3. Set up BROU-specific account parameters
  4. Test connectivity and file format compliance

docs.title: Generating BROU Payment Files
docs.text:
1. Create batch payments as usual
  2. Select BROU as the target bank
  3. Generate payment files using BROU format
  4. Submit files to BROU systems for processing

docs.title: File Validation
docs.text:
1. System automatically validates BROU format compliance
  2. Review validation results and error messages
  3. Correct any issues before file submission
  4. Confirm file integrity and format accuracy

docs.title: File Format Specifications
docs.text:
• BROU-specific file structure and layout
  • Field positioning and data formatting
  • Header and trailer record requirements
  • Validation checksums and control fields

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Pre-configured BROU file format
  • Automated field mapping and validation
  • Bank-specific data formatting
  • Compliance with BROU technical specifications

docs.title: Descripción
docs.text:
Módulo para generar archivos de pagos masivos en formato CABAL. Soporta dos configuraciones diferentes:

  • CABAL PMSA (Previsora Martinelli S.A.)
  • CABAL CMSA (Concesionaria Martinelli S.A.)

docs.title: Formato del Archivo
docs.text: El archivo generado contiene únicamente líneas de detalle (sin encabezado ni línea de cierre). Cada línea tiene una longitud de 128 caracteres.

docs.title: Estructura de cada línea
docs.text: Posición Longitud Campo Descripción 1-4 4 Constante "CBCU" 5-15 11 Número de comercio PMSA: 28490120004, CMSA: 28437937007 16 1 Código de moneda N=Pesos, U=Dólares 17-32 16 Número de tarjeta Del afiliado 33-41 9 Nro. socio institución PMSA: Matrícula/Módulo, CMSA: Contrato 42-52 11 Importe a debitar Con 2 decimales implícitos 53-58 6 Fecha de proceso DDMMAA 59-62 4 Número de cuota MMAA 63-74 12 ID Factura Número de factura 75 1 Aplica devolución IVA 1=Sí, 0=No 76-90 15 Importe gravado básico Con 2 decimales implícitos 91-105 15 Importe gravado mínimo Con 2 decimales implícitos 106-120 15 Importe devolución IVA Con 2 decimales implícitos 121-128 8 Filler Espacios

docs.title: CABAL PMSA
docs.text:
• Número de comercio: 28490120004
  • Nro. socio institución: Campo Matrícula/Módulo en la factura
  • Número de cuota: Mes/Año del campo Fecha de entrega

docs.title: CABAL CMSA
docs.text:
• Número de comercio: 28437937007
  • Nro. socio institución: Campo Contrato en la factura
  • Número de cuota: Mes/Año de la fecha de factura

docs.title: Dependencias
docs.text: • account_batch_payment_q

docs.title: Instalación
docs.text:
1. Copiar el módulo al directorio de addons
  2. Actualizar la lista de aplicaciones en Odoo
  3. Instalar el módulo "Quanam Batch Payment - CABAL"

docs.title: Uso
docs.text:
1. Ir a Facturación > Pagos > Pagos por lotes
  2. Crear un nuevo lote de pagos
  3. Seleccionar la configuración "CABAL PMSA" o "CABAL CMSA" según corresponda
  4. Agregar los pagos al lote
  5. Generar el archivo de pago

docs.title: Account Check Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides enhanced check management functionality for the Quanam localization, extending Odoo's standard payment capabilities with advanced check processing, tracking, and management features.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Advanced Check Processing
docs.text: Comprehensive check management system with support for both issued and received checks, check printing, and automated check number sequencing.

docs.title: Check Status Tracking
docs.text: Complete check lifecycle tracking from issuance to clearing, with status updates, hold management, and reconciliation capabilities.

docs.title: Check Register Management
docs.text: Enhanced check register functionality with detailed check logs, batch processing capabilities, and comprehensive reporting for audit and compliance purposes.

docs.title: Payment Integration
docs.text: Seamless integration with Odoo's payment processing system, enabling checks as a standard payment method with full accounting integration.

docs.title: Check Printing
docs.text: Built-in check printing functionality with customizable check formats, alignment options, and support for various check paper types.

docs.title: Journal Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Journals
  2. Configure check-specific journal settings
  3. Set up check number sequences and formatting
  4. Enable check printing and processing features

docs.title: Check Format Setup
docs.text:
1. Configure check printing formats and layouts
  2. Set up check paper dimensions and alignment
  3. Customize check content and positioning
  4. Test check printing with sample checks

docs.title: Payment Method Configuration
docs.text:
1. Configure check payment methods
  2. Set up check-specific validation rules
  3. Enable check processing workflows
  4. Configure check status tracking

docs.title: Issuing Checks
docs.text:
1. Create vendor payments using check payment method
  2. System automatically assigns check numbers
  3. Print checks using configured formats
  4. Track check status and delivery

docs.title: Check Registration
docs.text:
1. Register checks in the check register
  2. Update check status as they progress through banking
  3. Handle check returns and stop payments
  4. Reconcile cleared checks with bank statements

docs.title: Check Reconciliation
docs.text:
1. Import bank statements with check clearing information
  2. Match cleared checks to outstanding check records
  3. Update check status automatically
  4. Handle exceptions and discrepancies

docs.title: Reporting
docs.text:
1. Generate check registers and reports
  2. Monitor outstanding checks and aging
  3. Track check processing performance
  4. Analyze check usage patterns

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• Enhanced account.journal: Extended with check-specific functionality
  • Enhanced account.payment: Added check processing capabilities
  • Enhanced account.payment.register: Improved payment registration with check support

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Complete check lifecycle management
  • Automated check numbering and sequencing
  • Check printing with customizable formats
  • Integration with banking and reconciliation
  • Comprehensive check reporting and analytics

docs.title: Account Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.2.6 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module extends Odoo's accounting functionality to provide enhanced multi-currency support for customer and supplier accounts, automatic tax refund processing, and advanced payment management features.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Multi-Currency Account Management
docs.text: Configure multiple receivable and payable accounts per partner and currency. The system automatically selects the appropriate account based on the currency and partner type, with support for credit card accounts in addition to standard receivable/payable accounts.

docs.title: Tax Refund Management
docs.text: Configure tax refund legislation with specific document types and tax combinations. The system automatically detects applicable tax refunds during payment processing and provides warnings for mixed tax refund scenarios.

docs.title: Advanced Payment Processing
docs.text: Process multiple invoices simultaneously with the multi-invoice payment wizard, generate automatic debit payments for recurring transactions, and implement payment blocking functionality to prevent unauthorized payments.

docs.title: Document Processing
docs.text: Automatically extract document numbers from references, process intercompany invoices with proper document types, and post draft entries via cron jobs.

docs.title: Multi-Currency Accounts
docs.text:
1. Go to Contacts > Contacts
  2. Open a partner form
  3. In the Accounting tab, configure accounts for each currency
  4. Set up both receivable and payable accounts for each currency

docs.title: Tax Refund Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Devolución de impuesto
  2. Create tax refund legislation configurations
  3. Specify document types, applicable taxes, and maximum amounts
  4. Configure payment methods to apply tax refunds

docs.title: Taxable Amount Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Settings
  2. In the Taxes section, configure Impuestos Gravables
  3. Select taxes that should be considered for taxable amount calculation

docs.title: Multi-Currency Payments
docs.text: When creating payments, the system automatically selects the appropriate account based on the partner, currency, and payment type. The system looks for partner-specific accounts first, then falls back to default accounts.

docs.title: Tax Refund Processing
docs.text:
1. Configure tax refund legislation in the system
  2. Set up payment methods with tax refund capabilities
  3. When processing payments, the system automatically detects applicable refunds
  4. For mixed scenarios, the system provides warnings and confirmation dialogs

docs.title: Multi-Invoice Payments
docs.text:
1. Select multiple invoices from the invoice list view
  2. Click Pagar en múltiples formas button
  3. Configure payment lines with different journals and methods
  4. The system automatically distributes payments across invoices

docs.title: Payment Blocking
docs.text:
1. Select invoices that should be blocked for payment
  2. Use the Des(Bloquear Pago) button to toggle payment blocking
  3. Blocked invoices cannot be paid until unblocked
  4. The system prevents payment registration for blocked invoices

docs.title: Automatic Debit Payments
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Customers > Pagos por Débito Automático
  2. Configure journal and payment method
  3. Set payment date
  4. The system generates payments for all eligible invoices

docs.title: Document Processing
docs.text: The system automatically: * Extracts document numbers from invoice references * Processes intercompany invoices with proper document types * Posts draft entries based on configured rules * Computes appropriate accounts for payment terms

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• res.partner.account: Multi-currency account configuration for partners
  • tax.refund.legislation.config: Tax refund legislation configuration
  • multi.invoice.payment.wizard: Wizard for multi-invoice payments
  • automatic.debit.payment.wizard: Wizard for automatic debit payments
  • vat.refund.confirmation.wizard: Confirmation dialog for tax refund scenarios

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Automatic account computation with fallback logic
  • Multi-currency support with partner-specific accounts
  • Tax refund detection and processing
  • Payment blocking and validation
  • Enhanced document processing
  • Automatic posting via cron jobs

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text:
• account: Core accounting functionality
  • l10n_latam_invoice_document: Latin American document support

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Maintainers: This module is maintained by Quanam.

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Maintainers: This module is maintained by Quanam.

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

This module is part of the Quanam/account_q project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute. To learn how please visit Quanam.

docs.title: License
docs.text: This module is licensed under AGPL-3.

docs.title: Account Q Payment from File
docs.text: This module allows processing customer payments from uploaded files (Excel or TXT format).

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Add barcode field to customer invoices
  • Upload payment files (Excel from Red Pagos, TXT from Abitab)
  • Automatically match payments to invoices using barcodes
  • Process payments with configurable journal and payment method
  • Track processing status and errors for each line
  • Support for Uruguayan payment networks (Red Pagos and Abitab)

docs.title: Excel (Red Pagos)
docs.text: Columns: FECHA, TRACK, MONEDA, IMPORTE, MOVIMIENTO, SUB AGENCIA, CAJA

docs.title: TXT (Abitab)
docs.text: Fixed-width format with specific positions for each field.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Customers > Payments from File
  2. Create a new payment file record
  3. Select the payment journal and method
  4. Upload the file
  5. Process the file to create payments

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text: Add barcode information to customer invoices for automatic matching with payment files.

docs.title: Account Q Withholding
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.2.1 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides comprehensive tax withholding calculation and management functionality, extending Odoo's standard tax capabilities with advanced withholding tax processing, automatic calculations, and compliance reporting.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Automatic Withholding Calculations
docs.text: Advanced withholding tax calculation engine that automatically computes withholding amounts based on tax configurations, vendor settings, and regulatory requirements.

docs.title: Tax Withholding Management
docs.text: Comprehensive tax withholding management with support for multiple withholding types, rate configurations, and exemption handling for different vendor categories.

docs.title: Compliance and Reporting
docs.text: Built-in compliance features with automated withholding reports, tax certificates generation, and regulatory reporting to meet local tax authority requirements.

docs.title: Account Position Integration
docs.text: Integration with fiscal positions to automatically apply appropriate withholding tax rules based on vendor location, tax residence, and business relationship type.

docs.title: Withholding Certificates
docs.text: Automated generation of withholding tax certificates and supporting documentation required for vendor payments and tax authority submissions.

docs.title: Tax Withholding Setup
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Taxes
  2. Configure withholding tax types and rates
  3. Set up withholding calculation rules and thresholds
  4. Configure exemption criteria and special cases

docs.title: Account Positions
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Fiscal Positions
  2. Configure fiscal positions with withholding tax rules
  3. Set up automatic tax mapping for withholding scenarios
  4. Define position-specific withholding requirements

docs.title: Vendor Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Contacts > Vendors
  2. Configure vendor-specific withholding settings
  3. Set up tax residence and exemption status
  4. Configure withholding certificates and documentation

docs.title: Processing Vendor Bills
docs.text:
1. Create vendor bills as usual
  2. System automatically calculates applicable withholding taxes
  3. Review withholding amounts and adjustments
  4. Post bills with proper withholding tax entries

docs.title: Withholding Certificates
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Withholding > Certificates
  2. Generate withholding certificates for vendors
  3. Print or export certificates for distribution
  4. Track certificate status and delivery

docs.title: Compliance Reporting
docs.text:
1. Access withholding tax reports from accounting menu
  2. Generate periodic withholding summaries
  3. Export data for tax authority submissions
  4. Monitor compliance status and deadlines

docs.title: Payment Processing
docs.text:
1. Process vendor payments with withholding tax deductions
  2. Automatic calculation of net payment amounts
  3. Generate withholding tax vouchers and documentation
  4. Update withholding tax accounts and balances

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• account.tax: Enhanced tax configuration with withholding capabilities
  • account.resguardo: Withholding tax management and certificates
  • account.fiscal.position: Enhanced fiscal position with withholding rules
  • account.move: Extended invoice processing with withholding calculations

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Automatic withholding tax calculations
  • Multi-type withholding support (income, VAT, etc.)
  • Integration with fiscal positions
  • Automated certificate generation
  • Compliance reporting and documentation
  • Vendor-specific withholding management

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text:
• account: Core accounting functionality
  • account_q: Enhanced accounting features

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

docs.text: This module is licensed under AGPL-3.

docs.title: Account Reports Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.2.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides enhanced accounting reports for the Quanam localization, extending Odoo's standard reporting capabilities with specialized financial reports, statement of changes in equity, and advanced analytics for comprehensive financial reporting.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Statement of Changes in Equity
docs.text: Comprehensive statement of changes in equity report with detailed tracking of equity movements, capital changes, retained earnings, and other comprehensive income components.

docs.title: Advanced Financial Reports
docs.text: Enhanced financial reporting with customizable report templates, multi-period comparisons, and detailed breakdowns for comprehensive financial analysis.

docs.title: Excel Export Capabilities
docs.text: Native Excel export functionality for all reports, enabling advanced data manipulation, custom formatting, and integration with external analysis tools.

docs.title: Configurable Report Parameters
docs.text: Flexible report configuration system that allows customization of report periods, comparison dates, account groupings, and presentation formats.

docs.title: Multi-Period Analysis
docs.text: Advanced multi-period analysis capabilities with trend analysis, variance reporting, and period-over-period comparisons for better financial insights.

docs.title: Report Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Statement Change Equity Config
  2. Configure equity account mappings and categories
  3. Set up report parameters and presentation options
  4. Define calculation rules for equity components

docs.title: Account Grouping
docs.text:
1. Configure account groups for report presentation
  2. Set up mapping between chart of accounts and report categories
  3. Define calculation formulas for derived amounts
  4. Configure comparative period parameters

docs.title: Report Templates
docs.text:
1. Customize report templates and layouts
  2. Configure header information and company details
  3. Set up report formatting and presentation options
  4. Define export formats and options

docs.title: Generating Equity Reports
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Reporting > Statement Changes Equity
  2. Select reporting period and comparison dates
  3. Configure report parameters and options
  4. Generate and review the statement of changes in equity

docs.title: Excel Export
docs.text:
1. Generate any financial report
  2. Use Excel export functionality to download reports
  3. Leverage advanced Excel features for further analysis
  4. Share reports with stakeholders in Excel format

docs.title: Multi-Period Analysis
docs.text:
1. Configure multiple periods for comparison
  2. Generate trend reports and variance analysis
  3. Analyze period-over-period changes
  4. Create dashboard views with key metrics

docs.title: Custom Report Configuration
docs.text:
1. Access report configuration wizards
  2. Customize report parameters and filters
  3. Save custom report configurations for reuse
  4. Generate reports with specific requirements

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• statement.change.equity.conf: Equity report configuration
  • statement.changes.equity.wizard: Report generation wizard

docs.title: Reports
docs.text:
• Statement of Changes in Equity (PDF and Excel formats)
  • Custom financial reports with enhanced features
  • Multi-period comparative reports

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Advanced equity reporting with detailed breakdowns
  • Excel export with native formatting
  • Configurable report parameters and layouts
  • Multi-period analysis and comparison
  • Integration with standard Odoo accounting reports

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text:
• base: Core Odoo functionality
  • account: Core accounting functionality
  • report_xlsx: Excel reporting capabilities

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Maintainers: This module is maintained by Quanam.

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute. To learn how please visit Quanam.

docs.title: Approvals Fleet Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides fleet-specific approval workflows for the Quanam localization, extending approval processes with fleet management integration, vehicle request approvals, and fleet operation authorization workflows.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Fleet Approval Workflows: Specialized approval workflows for fleet operations and requests
  • Vehicle Request Management: Comprehensive vehicle request and approval processing
  • Fleet Operation Authorization: Advanced authorization controls for fleet-related operations
  • Integrated Fleet Management: Deep integration with fleet management and approval systems

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • base: Core Odoo functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: Quanam License: LGPL-3

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

docs.title: Cash Management Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.2.6.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides comprehensive cash management functionality for small cash (petty cash) and central cash operations, extending Odoo's accounting capabilities with advanced cash flow control, session management, and multi-location cash handling.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Petty Cash Management
docs.text: Complete petty cash management system with session-based controls, opening and closing procedures, and detailed cash movement tracking for small daily operations.

docs.title: Central Cash Operations
docs.text: Advanced central cash management with multi-location support, fund transfers between cash points, and centralized cash flow oversight.

docs.title: Session Management
docs.text: Comprehensive cash session management with opening control wizards, session validation, and automatic reconciliation procedures to ensure cash accuracy.

docs.title: Cash Fund Transfers
docs.text: Seamless cash transfers between different cash funds and locations with proper accounting entries, approval workflows, and transfer documentation.

docs.title: Dashboard and Reporting
docs.text: Real-time cash management dashboard with visual indicators, cash position summaries, and comprehensive reporting tools for cash flow analysis.

docs.title: Bill and Payment Integration
docs.text: Integration with bill management and payment processing, enabling direct cash payments from the cash management interface with automatic accounting entries.

docs.title: Cash Management Setup
docs.text:
1. Go to Accounting > Configuration > Settings
  2. Enable Cash Management features in the accounting settings
  3. Configure cash management parameters and default accounts
  4. Set up user permissions for cash operations

docs.title: Cash Fund Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Cash Management > Configuration > Cash Funds
  2. Create cash fund configurations for each location
  3. Set up opening balances and maximum cash limits
  4. Configure approval levels for cash operations

docs.title: Payment Methods
docs.text:
1. Go to Cash Management > Configuration > Payment Methods
  2. Configure cash-specific payment methods
  3. Set up integration with accounting journals
  4. Define validation rules for cash payments

docs.title: Opening Cash Session
docs.text:
1. Go to Cash Management > Sessions
  2. Click New Session to start a cash session
  3. Use the opening control wizard to set initial cash amounts
  4. Validate the opening balance and start operations

docs.title: Processing Cash Payments
docs.text:
1. Access the cash management interface
  2. Select bills or create new payment entries
  3. Process cash payments with automatic accounting integration
  4. Track all cash movements in real-time

docs.title: Cash Fund Transfers
docs.text:
1. Go to Cash Management > Fund Transfers
  2. Create new transfer between cash funds
  3. Specify transfer amounts and purpose
  4. Complete transfer with proper documentation

docs.title: Session Closing
docs.text:
1. Count physical cash at end of session
  2. Use closing wizard to validate cash amounts
  3. Reconcile any differences with proper justification
  4. Close session and generate closing reports

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• cash.management.session: Cash session management
  • cash.management.config: Cash fund configuration
  • cash.management.bill: Bill processing integration
  • cash.fund.transfer: Inter-fund transfer management
  • payment.method: Enhanced payment method configuration

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Session-based cash control with opening/closing procedures
  • Multi-location cash fund management
  • Integrated bill processing and payment handling
  • Real-time cash position monitoring
  • Automated accounting entry generation
  • Comprehensive audit trails and reporting

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text:
• base: Core Odoo functionality
  • account: Core accounting functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Maintainers: This module is maintained by Quanam.

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute. To learn how please visit Quanam.

docs.text: This module is licensed under LGPL-3.

docs.title: Cash POS Link Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides integration between cash management and POS systems, enabling seamless cash flow tracking, POS-to-cash synchronization, and unified cash management across POS and back-office operations.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Cash-POS Integration: Direct integration between cash management and POS systems
  • Cash Flow Synchronization: Real-time synchronization of cash movements between POS and cash management
  • Unified Cash Tracking: Consolidated cash tracking across POS operations and cash management sessions
  • Cross-System Reconciliation: Advanced reconciliation between POS cash operations and cash management records

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • base: Core Odoo functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: Quanam License: LGPL-3

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

docs.title: POS Cash Bridge Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides a bridge between POS and cash management systems, facilitating seamless communication and data exchange between point-of-sale operations and cash handling processes.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• POS-Cash Bridge: Advanced bridge functionality between POS and cash systems
  • Data Exchange: Seamless data exchange and communication protocols
  • Transaction Bridging: Advanced transaction bridging between POS and cash operations
  • Integrated Cash Handling: Unified cash handling across POS and cash management systems

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • base: Core Odoo functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: Quanam License: LGPL-3

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

docs.title: POS Link Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides POS linking functionality for the Quanam localization, enabling integration between POS systems and other business processes with data synchronization and workflow connectivity.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• POS Integration: Advanced integration between POS and other business modules
  • Data Synchronization: Real-time data synchronization between POS and back-office systems
  • Workflow Connectivity: Seamless workflow connections between POS operations and business processes
  • Transaction Linking: Advanced transaction linking and cross-system reference management

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • base: Core Odoo functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: Quanam License: LGPL-3

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

docs.title: POS Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.1.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides enhanced POS (Point of Sale) configurations for the Quanam localization, extending Odoo's standard POS functionality with advanced payment processing, transaction logging, and multi-currency support.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Enhanced Payment Processing
docs.text: Configure advanced payment methods and terminals with support for multiple payment providers. The system provides seamless integration with various payment terminals and processors.

docs.title: Transaction Logging
docs.text: Comprehensive transaction logging system that tracks all POS operations, providing detailed audit trails and transaction history for compliance and analysis purposes.

docs.title: Multi-Currency Support
docs.text: Full support for multi-currency transactions with real-time currency conversion rates and automatic account selection based on the transaction currency.

docs.title: Payment Provider Integration
docs.text: Advanced integration with multiple payment providers, enabling flexible payment processing options including credit cards, digital wallets, and other electronic payment methods.

docs.title: Payment Terminal Management
docs.text: Centralized management of payment terminals with configuration options for different terminal types, connection settings, and operational parameters.

docs.title: Payment Providers
docs.text:
1. Go to Point of Sale > Configuration > Payment Providers
  2. Configure your payment provider settings
  3. Set up provider-specific parameters and credentials
  4. Test the connection to ensure proper integration

docs.title: Payment Terminals
docs.text:
1. Go to Point of Sale > Configuration > Payment Terminals
  2. Create new payment terminal configurations
  3. Configure terminal-specific settings and connection parameters
  4. Associate terminals with appropriate payment providers

docs.title: Currency Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Point of Sale > Configuration > Currencies
  2. Enable multi-currency support in POS settings
  3. Configure exchange rate sources and update frequencies
  4. Set default currencies for different store locations

docs.title: Processing Payments
docs.text:
1. In the POS interface, select products and finalize the order
  2. Choose payment method from configured providers
  3. The system automatically handles currency conversion if needed
  4. Complete the transaction and generate receipt

docs.title: Transaction Monitoring
docs.text:
1. Access Point of Sale > Reporting > Transaction Logs
  2. Review detailed transaction history and audit trails
  3. Filter transactions by date, terminal, or payment method
  4. Export transaction data for external analysis

docs.title: Terminal Management
docs.text:
1. Monitor terminal status from the POS dashboard
  2. Configure terminal-specific settings as needed
  3. Troubleshoot connection issues using diagnostic tools
  4. Update terminal firmware and configurations remotely

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• pos.transaction.log: Comprehensive transaction logging
  • pos.transaction: Enhanced transaction processing
  • pos.payment.provider: Payment provider configuration
  • pos.payment.terminal: Payment terminal management
  • res.currency: Enhanced currency handling for POS

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Advanced payment processing with multiple providers
  • Comprehensive transaction logging and audit trails
  • Multi-currency support with automatic conversion
  • Payment terminal management and monitoring
  • Enhanced security and compliance features

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • account: Core accounting functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Maintainers: This module is maintained by Quanam.

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute. To learn how please visit Quanam.

docs.text: This module is licensed under LGPL-3.

docs.title: Purchase Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.1.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides enhanced purchase order management for the Quanam localization, extending Odoo's standard purchase functionality with advanced workflow controls, supplier information management, and localized purchase processes.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Enhanced Purchase Order Workflow
docs.text: Advanced purchase order processing with localized workflow controls, custom approval processes, and enhanced document management tailored for regional business requirements.

docs.title: Supplier Information Management
docs.text: Comprehensive supplier information management with enhanced vendor catalog integration, supplier performance tracking, and advanced supplier relationship management tools.

docs.title: Localized Purchase Processes
docs.text: Purchase processes adapted to local business practices and regulatory requirements, including custom document types, tax handling, and compliance features.

docs.title: Advanced Reporting
docs.text: Enhanced reporting capabilities for purchase analysis, supplier performance evaluation, and procurement insights with customizable dashboards and metrics.

docs.title: Purchase Settings
docs.text:
1. Go to Purchase > Configuration > Settings
  2. Configure localized purchase parameters
  3. Set up default values for purchase orders
  4. Enable enhanced workflow features

docs.title: Supplier Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Purchase > Suppliers
  2. Configure supplier information and catalogs
  3. Set up supplier-specific terms and conditions
  4. Configure supplier evaluation criteria

docs.title: Document Types
docs.text:
1. Configure localized document types for purchase orders
  2. Set up custom numbering sequences
  3. Define document validation rules
  4. Configure approval workflows

docs.title: Creating Purchase Orders
docs.text:
1. Go to Purchase > Purchase Orders
  2. Create new purchase orders with enhanced workflow
  3. Select suppliers and products from enhanced catalogs
  4. Apply localized business rules and validations

docs.title: Supplier Management
docs.text:
1. Access Purchase > Suppliers
  2. Manage comprehensive supplier information
  3. Track supplier performance and history
  4. Maintain supplier catalogs and price lists

docs.title: Purchase Analysis
docs.text:
1. Use enhanced reporting tools for purchase analysis
  2. Monitor supplier performance metrics
  3. Analyze procurement patterns and costs
  4. Generate compliance and audit reports

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• Enhanced purchase.order: Extended purchase order functionality
  • Enhanced product.supplierinfo: Improved supplier information management

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Localized purchase order workflows
  • Enhanced supplier catalog management
  • Advanced reporting and analytics
  • Compliance and regulatory features
  • Integration with accounting and inventory

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • purchase: Core purchase functionality

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
Authors: * Quanam

Contributors: * Quanam Development Team

Maintainers: This module is maintained by Quanam.

Quanam is a company specialized in Odoo development and implementation.

This module is part of the Quanam/l10n_q project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute. To learn how please visit Quanam.

docs.title: License
docs.text: This module is licensed under LGPL-3.

docs.title: Purchase Q Approval Levels
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module extends the Purchase Q functionality by adding sophisticated approval level management for purchase orders, providing multi-level approval workflows, amount-based approval rules, and automated notification systems.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Multi-Level Approval Workflow
docs.text: Sophisticated approval workflow system with configurable approval levels based on purchase order amounts, vendor categories, and organizational hierarchy.

docs.title: Amount-Based Approval Rules
docs.text: Flexible approval rules that automatically route purchase orders to appropriate approvers based on order values, with configurable thresholds and escalation procedures.

docs.title: Automated Notifications
docs.text: Comprehensive notification system that automatically alerts approvers via email when purchase orders require their attention, with customizable email templates and escalation timers.

docs.title: Approval Tracking
docs.text: Complete approval tracking with audit trails, approval history, and status monitoring to ensure transparency and accountability in the approval process.

docs.title: Delegation Management
docs.text: Advanced delegation capabilities that allow approvers to delegate approval authority temporarily or permanently, ensuring continuous workflow operation.

docs.title: Approval Level Setup
docs.text:
1. Go to Purchase > Configuration > Approval Levels
  2. Create approval level configurations
  3. Define approval thresholds and rules
  4. Set up approver assignments and hierarchies

docs.title: Email Template Configuration
docs.text:
1. Configure notification email templates
  2. Customize email content and formatting
  3. Set up automatic email triggers
  4. Configure escalation email procedures

docs.title: User Permissions
docs.text:
1. Assign approval permissions to users
  2. Configure approval limits for each user
  3. Set up approval delegation rules
  4. Define backup approver assignments

docs.title: Purchase Order Approval Process
docs.text:
1. Create purchase orders as usual
  2. System automatically determines required approval levels
  3. Purchase orders are routed to appropriate approvers
  4. Approvers receive email notifications for pending approvals

docs.title: Approval Management
docs.text:
1. Access approval dashboard to view pending approvals
  2. Review purchase order details and supporting documents
  3. Approve or reject purchase orders with comments
  4. Track approval status and history

docs.title: Delegation Management
docs.text:
1. Set up temporary approval delegations
  2. Configure delegation periods and scope
  3. Monitor delegation status and activity
  4. Revert delegations when needed

docs.title: Approval Monitoring
docs.text:
1. Monitor approval workflow performance
  2. Track approval times and bottlenecks
  3. Generate approval reports and analytics
  4. Identify process improvement opportunities

  • Approval confirmation emails

docs.title: Stock Q
docs.text:
Version: 18.0.1.0.0 Odoo Version: 18.0

This module provides enhanced inventory management functionality for the Quanam localization, extending Odoo's standard stock operations with advanced warehouse management, location tracking, and localized inventory processes.

docs.title: Table of contents
docs.text:
• Features
  • Configuration
  • Usage
  • Technical Details
  • Dependencies
  • Credits
  • License

docs.title: Enhanced Warehouse Management
docs.text: Advanced warehouse configuration and management with support for complex warehouse layouts, multi-location inventory tracking, and optimized picking strategies.

docs.title: Advanced Location Management
docs.text: Sophisticated location management system with hierarchical location structures, location-specific rules, and automated location assignment based on product characteristics.

docs.title: Improved Picking Operations
docs.text: Enhanced picking operations with optimized routing, batch picking capabilities, and advanced picking validation to improve warehouse efficiency and accuracy.

docs.title: Inventory Tracking
docs.text: Comprehensive inventory tracking with real-time quantity updates, movement history, and detailed audit trails for complete inventory visibility.

docs.title: Localized Stock Processes
docs.text: Stock management processes adapted to local business practices and regulatory requirements, including custom document types and compliance features.

docs.title: Warehouse Configuration
docs.text:
1. Go to Inventory > Configuration > Warehouses
  2. Configure warehouse layouts and operation types
  3. Set up warehouse-specific parameters and rules
  4. Configure picking and delivery strategies

docs.title: Location Management
docs.text:
1. Go to Inventory > Configuration > Locations
  2. Create and organize location hierarchies
  3. Configure location-specific rules and restrictions
  4. Set up automated location assignment logic

docs.title: Inventory Settings
docs.text:
1. Go to Inventory > Configuration > Settings
  2. Enable enhanced stock management features
  3. Configure inventory valuation methods
  4. Set up automated inventory processes

docs.title: Warehouse Operations
docs.text:
1. Process incoming shipments with enhanced receiving workflows
  2. Manage internal transfers between locations
  3. Execute optimized picking operations
  4. Handle outgoing deliveries with advanced shipping features

docs.title: Inventory Management
docs.text:
1. Monitor real-time inventory levels across locations
  2. Perform inventory adjustments and cycle counts
  3. Track product movements and location changes
  4. Analyze inventory turnover and performance

docs.title: Location Management
docs.text:
1. Organize products across warehouse locations
  2. Implement location-based picking strategies
  3. Monitor location capacity and utilization
  4. Optimize warehouse layout and product placement

docs.title: Models
docs.text:
• Enhanced stock.warehouse: Extended warehouse functionality
  • Enhanced stock.location: Improved location management
  • Enhanced stock.picking: Advanced picking operations
  • Enhanced stock.quant: Enhanced inventory tracking

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Multi-location inventory management
  • Advanced warehouse operation workflows
  • Optimized picking and delivery processes
  • Real-time inventory tracking and reporting
  • Integration with purchase and sales processes

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • stock: Core inventory functionality
